results.notes: pyserial installed, STM32_Programmer_CLI found in Program Files (x86)
Pin.toggle() not available, used manual toggle fallback
UART1-6 available. UART2 is REPL (skip in enumeration)
SPI2 at 1-4 MHz, write/read/full-duplex all OK
PA0, PA1, internal temp, internal VREF all OK
pyb.DAC on PA4. DAC-ADC cross-verify monotonic
machine.PWM on PA6, 1-5 kHz, duty sweep OK
Pin.irq on PC13, no spurious triggers
FDCAN hardware present but not in MicroPython build

phase2_results.notes: Timer(1) failed (ValueError: Timer doesn't exist). Used Timer(-1) virtual timer. LED blinks at 500ms.
Pin.irq on PC13 with IRQ_FALLING|IRQ_RISING. Press/release detected via UART2 VCP.
Combined heartbeat + button events in main.py. Phase 1 demo backed up as main_phase1_demo.py.

application.description: Heartbeat LED (PA5, 500ms blink) + Button B1 press/release events (PC13) over UART2 VCP
